---
title: "Advanced Dynamical Systems: From Chaos to Data-Driven Discovery"
subtitle: "CROSS-001 | Cross-Cutting Methods"
description: "Nonlinear dynamics, chaos, and modern data-driven methods for discovering and analyzing dynamical systems from data. Connects classical dynamical systems theory to machine learning and SciML."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Advanced Dynamical Systems: From Chaos to Data-Driven Discovery

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
